action.script:
branch=$(${git} branch --show-current)
upstream=$(${git} rev-parse --abbrev-ref @{u} 2>/dev/null || echo "no upstream")
ahead=$(${git} rev-list @{u}..HEAD --count 2>/dev/null || echo "-")
behind=$(${git} rev-list HEAD..@{u} --count 2>/dev/null || echo "-")
head_sha=$(${git} rev-parse HEAD)
staged=$(${git} diff --cached --name-only | wc -l | tr -d ' ')
unstaged=$(${git} diff --name-only | wc -l | tr -d ' ')
untracked=$(${git} ls-files --others --exclude-standard | wc -l | tr -d ' ')
stashes=$(${git} stash list | wc -l | tr -d ' ')
user_name=$(${git} config user.name)
user_email=$(${git} config user.email)
default_branch=$(${git} symbolic-ref refs/remotes/origin/HEAD 2>/dev/null | sed 's|refs/remotes/origin/||' || echo "unknown")
merge_base=$(${git} merge-base HEAD "origin/$default_branch" 2>/dev/null | cut -c1-7 || echo "-")
pack_size=$(${git} count-objects -vH 2>/dev/null | grep "size-pack" | awk '{print $2" "$3}')

repo_root=$(${git} rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null)

all_worktree_paths=$(${git} worktree list --porcelain 2>/dev/null | awk '/^worktree / { print substr($0, 10) }')

display_root=$(echo "$all_worktree_paths" | awk '
  NR == 1 {
    common_len = split($0, common, "/")
    next
  }
  {
    len = split($0, parts, "/")
    max = len < common_len ? len : common_len
    i = 1
    while (i <= max && parts[i] == common[i]) {
      i++
    }
    common_len = i - 1
  }
  END {
    path = ""
    for (i = 1; i <= common_len; i++) {
      if (i == 1 && common[i] == "") {
        path = "/"
      } else if (path == "/") {
        path = path common[i]
      } else {
        path = path "/" common[i]
      }
    }
    sub(/\/$/, "", path)
    print path
  }
')

worktree_list=$(${git} worktree list 2>/dev/null | grep -v "^${repo_root} " | sed '/^[[:space:]]*$/d')
worktree_count=$(echo "$worktree_list" | wc -l | tr -d ' ')

state=""
if [ -d "${repo:path}/.git/rebase-merge" ] || [ -d "${repo:path}/.git/rebase-apply" ]; then
  state="  ⚠️  REBASING"
elif [ -f "${repo:path}/.git/MERGE_HEAD" ]; then
  state="  ⚠️  MERGING"
elif [ -f "${repo:path}/.git/CHERRY_PICK_HEAD" ]; then
  state="  ⚠️  CHERRY-PICKING"
fi

echo "GIT USER"
echo "  $user_name  <$user_email>"
echo ""
echo "BRANCH$state"
echo "  $branch  →  $upstream    ↑$ahead  ↓$behind"
echo "  default: $default_branch    merge base: $merge_base"
echo "  $head_sha"
echo ""
echo "WORKING TREE"
echo "  staged=$staged  unstaged=$unstaged  untracked=$untracked  stash=$stashes"

if [ "$worktree_count" -gt 0 ] 2>/dev/null; then
  echo ""
  echo "WORKTREES (total: $worktree_count)"
  echo "$worktree_list" | awk -v root="${display_root}" '
    BEGIN { sub(/\/$/, "", root) }
    {
      path = $1
      if (root != "" && index(path, root"/") == 1) {
        rel = substr(path, length(root) + 2)
      } else {
        rel = path
      }
      printf "  %-40s %s %s\n", rel, $2, substr($0, index($0, $3))
    }'
fi

echo ""
echo "REMOTES"
${git} remote -v | grep fetch | awk '{printf "  %-10s %s\n", $1, $2}'
echo ""
echo "REPO"
echo "  pack size=$pack_size"

summary="[$branch] $head_sha  ↑$ahead ↓$behind  $user_name <$user_email>"
echo "$summary" | pbcopy

open "raycast://confetti"

archive_dir="${repo:path}/archive"

if [ ! -d "$archive_dir" ]; then
  mkdir "$archive_dir"
fi

archive_file="$archive_dir/${repo:name}_${sha:abbr}.tar.gz"

git archive --format=tar.gz --output="$archive_file" ${sha:abbr}

# https://manual.raycast.com/deeplinks
if [[ $? -eq 0 ]]; then
    open "raycast://confetti"
fi

open "$archive_dir"

echo "$archive_file" | pbcopy

branch=$(${git} branch --show-current)
local_commit=$(${git} rev-parse --short HEAD)

items="\"⚠️  Push ALL remotes\""
while IFS= read -r remote; do
  url=$(${git} remote get-url "$remote" 2>/dev/null || echo "N/A")
  remote_commit=$(${git} rev-parse --short "$remote/$branch" 2>/dev/null || echo "N/A")
  ahead=$(${git} log "$remote/$branch"..HEAD --oneline 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' ')
  items="${items}, \"${remote}  |  ${url}  |  remote: ${remote_commit}  ahead: ${ahead}\""
done < <(${git} remote)

selected=$(osascript -e "choose from list {$items} with title \"Force Push — branch: $branch  (local: $local_commit)\" with prompt \"Select remote to force push to:\" default items {} OK button name \"Force Push\" cancel button name \"Cancel\"")

if [ "$selected" = "false" ]; then
  exit 0
fi

if [[ "$selected" == "⚠️  Push ALL remotes" ]]; then
  while IFS= read -r remote; do
    ${git} push "$remote" --force-with-lease
  done < <(${git} remote)
else
  remote=$(echo "$selected" | awk -F'  \\|  ' '{print $1}')
  ${git} push "$remote" --force-with-lease
fi
